creator: patrick@spacesurfer.com
text:
I have an ATI Radeon HD 4650 on an amd64 machine. I am using xorg with
xf86-video-ati-6.14.2. I have 2 monitors running at resolution 1920x1200.

When I run startx all works fine. However, if I exit my X session and
run startx again then the kernel crashes and the system reboots.
